title: Ayra
description: Inspired by the palm trees of Arabia, Ayra consists of embroidery work in light pink and beige, across the sleeves of the abaya. Manufactured in Nida Fabric, a highly breathable and flowey material. The abaya has an A-Shape, allowing for freedom of movement and does not show the silhouette of the body. The Abaya also comes paired with a matching embroidered shawl, along it's border.

title: Feather Embroidery
description: Elevate your everyday wardrobe with a timeless blend of luxury and style. As seen. this classic black abaya features intricate, contrast white feather motif embroidery meticulously crafted in-house to offer a subtle statement of elegance. Tailored from ultra-smooth, premium Nida fabric, it delivers a flawless, fluid drape and a subtle, sophisticated sheen. Designed with a versatile, relaxed silhouette, it’s the ultimate wardrobe staple for the modern woman who values high-quality, empowering modest fashion.

title: Hala
description: Elevate your everyday modesty with a touch of timeless craftsmanship. Designed for the modern woman who values both sophistication and comfort, this classic black open abaya features striking, intricate geometric and botanical embroidery along the wide cuffs. The sharp white-and-charcoal contrast stitching adds an elegant, artisanal dimension to a fluid, graceful silhouette. Whether you’re dressing up for an evening out or keeping it effortlessly chic for daytime wear, its versatile open-front design drapes beautifully, making it an essential staple for your modest wardrobe. Design Details Color: Deep Jet Black Fabric: Premium, breathable, and lightweight crepe (non-see-through) Sleeve Style: Wide, relaxed sleeves featuring intricate high-contrast embroidery on the cuffs Cut: Classic open-front silhouette that flows gracefully with movement Please Note: The matching black waist belt is included with the abaya to let you style it open or cinched. The white inner slip dress worn by the model is sold separately.

title: Haya
description: Haya was inspired by the beauty and essence of Arabic Calligraphy. Featuring intricate, flowing calligraphy embroidered exclusively along the sleeves, this piece serves as a wearable masterpiece. Crafted for the modern woman who carries her heritage with grace, it strikes the perfect balance between statement detail and timeless simplicity. Haya comes paired with an embroidered chiffon shawl to complete the look.

title: Heirloom of Elegance
description: True to its name, the Heirloom of Elegance is a masterpiece designed to be cherished for generations. Crafted from the finest Nida fabric, this exquisite abaya radiates a luxurious, silky-smooth lustre and an effortless, fluid drape. The defining feature of this piece lies in its breathtaking, artisanal sleeve detailing. A stunning tapestry of intricate floral and botanical embroidery winds down the wide, relaxed sleeves, accented by delicate lattice-work cutouts and shimmering embellishments that beautifully catch the light. It perfectly balances traditional modesty with a contemporary, high-fashion sensibility.

title: Mini Hearts - Beige
description: The Mini Hearts - Linen Edition was inspired by the trend for minimalism and high quality embroidered modest wear. Manufactured in Noor Linen, the perfect fabric for abayas, high breathability, perfect for all day wear, and has a slit upto the knee for ease of mobility. This collection offers minimalism and fashion in one package. Available in 3 different colours - Pearl Grey, Sage Green and Beige. The Mini Hearts - Linen Edition is the perfect addition to your everyday wardrobe.

This collection offers minimalism and fashion in one package. Available in 3 different colours - Pearl Grey, Sage Green and Beige. The Mini Hearts - Linen Edition is the perfect addition to your everyday wardrobe.

title: Muna
description: Effortless structure meets timeless modesty. Meet the Muna Abaya—a sophisticated take on modern modest wear. Designed with a sharp, coat-style silhouette, it brings a structured, tailored elegance to your everyday wardrobe without compromising on comfort. Crafted from premium, ultra-smooth Nida fabric, it offers a luxurious, silk-like drape that resists creasing and moves beautifully with every step. Whether worn open for a fluid, contemporary look or cinched with the included matching belt for a defined silhouette, the Muna Abaya is the ultimate layering masterpiece.

title: Reem
description: Command a presence of sharp, modern elegance with the Reem Abaya. Blending contemporary tailored sophistication with timeless modesty, this piece features a structure-inspired coat silhouette. The clean lines, crisp fold-over lapels, and sophisticated collar bring a high-fashion, outerwear feel to your everyday modest wardrobe. Crafted with Nida fabric, the Reem Abaya features gorgeous tonal embroidery along the cuffs and panels, adding a subtle touch of luxury to a minimalist design. Its versatile open-front style offers a commanding, fluid aesthetic when left unbuttoned, or a beautifully structured look when tied at the waist. Perfect for corporate wear, formal events, or an elevated weekend ensemble.

title: Senel
description: Inspired by Traditional Arabian Architecture, part of the Peninsula Collection; Senel consists of geometric patterns in three different colours, that captures the essence of traditional Arabian Architecture and the modern outlook on Fashion. Senel bridges the gap between the worlds of Architecture and Fashion. The Abaya comes with a matching embroidered shawl to complete your look.

title: The Modest Drop - Black
description: Pure comfort, uncompromised elegance. Designed for the modern woman who values both ease and sophistication, the Modest Drop Abaya is the ultimate definition of relaxed luxury. Featuring a stunning, fluid silhouette that flows effortlessly with every movement, this piece offers a generous, relaxed fit without ever feeling bulky. Crafted from an exceptionally breathable and lightweight fabric, it is the perfect choice for warm days, layering, or whenever you want to feel completely weightless while staying fully covered.

description: Experience effortless sophistication with our signature pleated abaya - Vogue. Comes in Black, Navy Blue, Brown and Maroon. Designed for the woman who values both style and coverage, this piece features intricate vertical pleating along the bodice and cuffs, offering a refined silhouette that moves with you.

title: Zoya
description: A beautiful sister-piece to our Heirloom of Elegance, the Zoya Abaya is the epitome of a timeless classic. Cut from Nida fabric, this elegant closed abaya is crafted for the woman who appreciates subtle luxury, a flawless flow, and rich, heritage-inspired detailing. The true artistry of this piece is found in its captivating monochrome sleeve details. A delicate, dense lattice framework of geometric and linear embroidery stretches beautifully down the wide, relaxed cuffs. The precision of the high-contrast white-and-charcoal stitching against the formal black fabric creates a sharp, sophisticated aesthetic that instantly draws the eye. Designed with a sleek, modest closed-front silhouette, it drapes effortlessly without the need for additional layers underneath. Wear it loosely for a classic, sweeping A-line look.
